name: Reliable Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Family-owned luxury jewelry retailer and pawn shop operating since 1949 in Raleigh, NC, offering estate jewelry, custom design, and collateral-based loans.
description_long:
Reliable Jewelry Company was founded in 1949 by Abe Horwitz as the Dixie Loan Company, operating as a collateral lending business in downtown Raleigh. In 1976, the business acquired and consolidated with Reliable Loan & Jewelry, expanding its merchandise selection and establishing itself as a dual-purpose pawn and jewelry retail operation. Now in its third generation of family ownership, the company maintains both a retail jewelry sales model and a traditional pawn/collateral loan function, though the website emphasizes the retail jewelry aspect more prominently.

Reliable Jewelry offers a broad inventory of luxury goods including engagement rings, bridal jewelry, estate jewelry, timepieces (Rolex, Cartier, Tag Heuer), diamond rings, bracelets, earrings, and fashion jewelry. The company provides custom jewelry design services with CAD/CAM capability, ring resizing and repair, engagement ring resetting, and wedding band creation. As a pawn shop, they accept jewelry and collectibles as collateral for loans, though specific loan terms and processes are not detailed on the website.

The company distinguishes itself through three generations of family stewardship, a focus on "affordable prices without sacrificing service or expertise," and documented custom design capabilities with collaborative customer involvement. Customer testimonials emphasize personalized service, competitive pricing relative to national chains like Diamonds Direct, and staff expertise. The business operates from a brick-and-mortar location in downtown Raleigh and maintains a professional e-commerce presence.

A significant caveat is that while the company has legitimate pawn shop origins and likely still operates as a collateral lender, the website provides virtually no information about loan products, rates, terms, APR, loan amounts, or the collateral-lending process. Consumers seeking a pawn loan would have no way to understand the company's lending terms from digital channels alone and would need to visit in person or call directly.
pros: Three generations of family ownership since 1949 provides established reputation and business continuity
Custom jewelry design services with CAD/CAM software and collaborative design process
Carries premium luxury brands including Rolex, Cartier, and Tag Heuer timepieces
Documented ring repair, resizing, and restoration services with strong customer testimonials
Located in downtown Raleigh with brick-and-mortar presence for in-person transactions
Customer testimonials consistently praise personalized service and competitive pricing versus national chains
Transparent upfront estimates provided for custom design work before execution begins
cons: Website contains zero information about pawn loan products, rates, terms, APR, or collateral-lending processes despite being categorized as a pawn shop
No disclosure of business hours, phone number, or contact methods for loan inquiries on the website
Heavy emphasis on retail jewelry sales obscures the collateral-lending function, making it unclear if pawn services remain active
No information about acceptable collateral types beyond jewelry, or typical loan-to-value ratios
Customer testimonials focus exclusively on jewelry retail and repair services with no mention of loan experiences
best_for: Consumers in the Raleigh, NC area seeking luxury jewelry retail with custom design capabilities
Individuals needing jewelry repair, resizing, or restoration services with personalized attention
Engaged couples wanting custom wedding rings with collaborative design input and competitive pricing
Collectors of estate jewelry and luxury timepieces seeking authentication and retail purchase
diagnosis: Reliable Jewelry operates primarily as a luxury jewelry retailer and repair shop with a documented pawn shop heritage, but the website provides no details about collateral lending. Best suited for Raleigh-area customers seeking jewelry retail, custom design, or repair services; consumers interested in pawn loans should contact the business directly to verify loan product availability and terms.
services: New and estate jewelry retail sales
Luxury timepiece retail (Rolex, Cartier, Tag Heuer, and other brands)
Custom jewelry design with CAD/CAM rendering
Pawn lending with jewelry and collectibles as collateral (historical business function, not documented on website)
